channel.title: eve.center Blog — AI Web Agency Insights
channel.description: Articles about AI website building, multi-agent architecture, and how eve.center's agent swarm creates custom business websites.

item.title: AI Website Generator: How It Works in 2026
item.description: What AI website generators actually do behind the scenes, how they differ, and which ones produce sites you'd be proud to show customers.

item.title: How to Get a Website for Your Small Business in 2026
item.description: 5 options compared: AI-built, templates, DIY, freelancers, agencies. Real costs, real timelines, and a decision guide for small business owners.

item.title: Best AI Website Builder 2026: Ranked & Reviewed
item.description: Top 6 AI website builders ranked for 2026 with real pros, cons, pricing, and recommendations.

item.title: How Much Does a Website Cost in 2026?
item.description: Honest pricing breakdown: DIY, AI builders, freelancers, agencies. Real numbers, hidden costs, and Year 1 totals compared.

item.title: Hocoos Shut Down — Here's Where to Build Your Website Now
item.description: Hocoos AI Website Builder shut down April 23, 2026. Compare the best alternatives and learn how to migrate your site.

item.title: Architecture of an AI Agency: Why One Agent Isn't Enough
item.description: How eve.center uses a swarm of 5 specialized AI agents to build custom websites. A technical deep-dive into multi-agent architecture.
